summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin dashboard redesign with creative sidebar layout. All 9 admin sections functional with 100% backend API success rate.
passed_tests: Admin authentication with admin@example.com
All 9 sidebar navigation sections (Overview, Users, Payments, Games, Promotions, Announcements, KYC, Reports, Settings)
Sidebar collapse/expand toggle functionality
Admin overview with gradient stat cards (Total Users, Revenue, Deposits, Pending Payouts)
Game Performance table with breakdown by game
User management with search functionality
User detail modal with bet history display
Balance adjustment dialog with amount and reason fields
Ban/unban user toggle functionality
Pending withdrawal queue with Approve/Reject buttons
All transactions view with filtering
Game controls with house edge, min/max bet, maintenance toggle for all 5 games
Promo code creation/deletion with type, value, min deposit, max uses
Announcement creation/deletion with type (marquee/popup/notification) and active toggle
KYC requests view with approve/reject functionality
Reports section with financial metrics and game-by-game breakdown
Settings section with platform info and danger zone
Back to App link in sidebar footer
All 20 backend admin API endpoints (100% success rate)
Creative non-boxy sidebar design implementation
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all features working)
